consistency.level_and_scaling: Consistent. Level 5 spell, scales by targeting one additional creature per slot level above 5th.
consistency.duration_and_save: Standard spell structure for paralysis effects, requiring concentration and allowing repeated saving throws to break the effect.
consistency.component_clarity: Standard components (V, S, M) with a specific material component specified.

quality.mechanics_description: The description is clear regarding the target, initial save (Wisdom), effect (paralysis), duration (Concentration, up to 1 minute), and exit condition (successful end-of-turn save). The exclusion of undead is a key mechanical detail.
quality.at_higher_levels: The scaling for higher levels is mechanically sound and clearly defined, adding targets based on slot level incrementally.

mechanics.action_economy: 1 Action casting time, Concentration duration (standard for powerful control effects).
mechanics.critical_interactions: Paralyzed condition provides advantage on attack rolls against the target and automatic critical hits on melee attacks against it. This is extremely potent, justifying the concentration and save mechanics.
mechanics.class_availability: Standard spell list for primary arcane/charismatic casters (Bard, Sorcerer, Warlock, Wizard).

analysis.recommendations: None. The data adheres perfectly to standard TTRPG spell formatting and mechanical expectations.
